---
title: 'Publications'
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date-format: 'MMMM,<br>YYYY'
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
listing:
- id: preprints
  contents:
    - publications.yml
  sort: 'issued desc'
  type: table
  fields: [date, title]
  field-display-names:
    date: Submitted
    title: Title
  include:
    categories: [preprint]
- id: articles2
  # template: papers/listing.qmd
  # template: papers/publications.js
  contents:
    - publications.yml
    # - "publications/*/*/**.qmd"
  # page-size: 10
  sort: 'issued desc'
  type: table
  # categories: true
  # sort-ui: [date, title, journal-title]
  # filter-ui: [date, title, journal-title]
  fields: [date, title, journal-title]
  field-display-names:
    date: Issued
    title: Title
    journal-title: Journal
  exclude:
    categories: [preprint]

---

## Preprints

:::{#preprints}
:::

## Publications

:::{#articles2}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  for (const title of document.querySelectorAll(".listing-title")) {
    const text = title.textContent;
    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
    let remaining = text;

    while (true) {
      const openIndex = remaining.indexOf("<i>");

      if (openIndex === -1) {
        fragment.append(document.createTextNode(remaining));
        break;
      }

      const closeIndex = remaining.indexOf("</i>", openIndex + 3);

      if (closeIndex === -1) {
        fragment.append(document.createTextNode(remaining));
        break;
      }

      if (openIndex > 0) {
        fragment.append(document.createTextNode(remaining.slice(0, openIndex)));
      }

      const italic = document.createElement("i");
      italic.textContent = remaining.slice(openIndex + 3, closeIndex);
      fragment.append(italic);

      remaining = remaining.slice(closeIndex + 4);
    }

    title.replaceChildren(fragment);
  }
});
</script>
